general_notes: Validating therapeutic and diagnostic product candidates in development. All information must be product-specific and verifiable from public sources (company websites, press releases, clinical trial databases, industry news). Coherence across the row is critical - ensure all information pertains to the exact Product/Candidate (and its occasional theranostic partner). Dates in Latest News should be recent relative to February 12, 2026.

search_groups.description: Product identifier used for row context - not validated
Company ownership and target/indication details typically found together in company pipeline pages and press releases
Scientific approach, therapeutic/diagnostic agents, and development stage information from R&D publications and clinical trial data
Clinical trial IDs, recent news, and milestone estimates from clinical databases and industry news sources
Product-specific partnerships and collaborations from company announcements and partnership databases

validation_targets.description: Unique identifier for each therapeutic or diagnostic product candidate
validation_targets.notes: This is the primary identifier for each row. Used for context but not validated. Ensure coherence that all other information in the row pertains to this exact product.

validation_targets.description: Owning company for the specific product candidate
validation_targets.notes: Verify from official company sources (website, pipeline pages, press releases) that this company owns/develops the specific product. Watch for similar-sounding products from different companies.

validation_targets.description: Specific biological target and medical indication for the product
validation_targets.notes: Verify from company pipeline documentation or clinical trial data. Include both target (e.g., FAP, PSMA) and indication (e.g., oncology, specific cancer types).

validation_targets.description: Type of therapeutic agent used in the product
validation_targets.notes: Verify from product descriptions, scientific publications, or company R&D materials. Examples: radiopharmaceutical, antibody-drug conjugate, small molecule, etc.

validation_targets.description: Type of diagnostic agent used in the product
validation_targets.notes: Verify from product descriptions or theranostic partner information. Examples: imaging agent, companion diagnostic, biomarker test, etc.

validation_targets.description: Scientific and biochemical approach used in the product
validation_targets.notes: Verify from company R&D materials, scientific publications, or patent filings. Include specific biochemical mechanisms, targeting approaches, or technology platforms.

validation_targets.description: Clinical trial identifier from public databases
validation_targets.notes: Verify existence and status in ClinicalTrials.gov or other public trial databases. Format typically includes NCT number or other registry identifiers.

validation_targets.description: Current development stage of the product
validation_targets.notes: Verify from company pipeline updates, press releases, or clinical trial status. Examples: Preclinical, Phase 1, Phase 2, Phase 3, Approved, etc.

validation_targets.description: Recent product-specific news items with dates
validation_targets.notes: Verify accuracy and recency from reputable industry news sources. Dates should be current as of February 12, 2026. Format as bullet points with dates (e.g., '• Feb 10, 2026: Phase 2 results announced').
examples: • Feb 10, 2026: Positive Phase 2 results announced at ASCO GU
• Jan 15, 2026: FDA grants Fast Track designation
• Dec 5, 2025: Partnership announced with academic center

validation_targets.description: Projected milestones and indications of potential delays or abandonment
validation_targets.notes: Verify projected milestones from company guidance or analyst reports. Research any public indications of abandonment, delays, or challenges from news, SEC filings, or conference presentations.
examples: No recent updates - monitor for abandonment signs

validation_targets.description: Active and product-specific partnerships and collaborations
validation_targets.notes: Verify from company announcements, partnership databases, or news sources. Ensure partnerships are specific to this product, not just general company partnerships.
examples: Collaboration with University of California for clinical trials
License agreement with BioNTech for manufacturing

clarifying_questions: Should I prioritize verification from official company sources over third-party news for development stage information? Would you like more thorough searching for clinical trial details, which increases processing time but improves accuracy?

config_change_log.instructions: Generate validation configuration for a table tracking therapeutic and diagnostic product candidates. Table purpose: Track therapeutic and diagnostic product candidates in development, including their product, target, development stage, and latest news. ID columns: Product/Candidate (unique identifier for each product entry). Research columns: Company Name (verify the owning company for the specific product from official sources), Target / Indication (verify the specific target and indication from company pipeline or clinical trial data), Therapeutic Agent (verify the type of therapeutic agent, if applicable, from product descriptions), Diagnostic Agent (verify the type of diagnostic agent, if applicable, from product descriptions), Specific Biochemistry & Approach (verify the scientific and biochemical approach from company R&D or scientific publications), Current/Last Trial ID (verify the existence and status of the trial ID in public databases like ClinicalTrials.gov), Development Stage (verify the current development stage from company pipeline or press releases), Latest News (Bulleted with Date) (verify the accuracy and recency of news items, ensuring dates are current as of February 12, 2026, and news is product-specific), Next Milestone Estimate & Abandonment Signs (verify projected milestones and research any public indications of abandonment or delays), Key Partnerships/Collaborators For this Product (verify active and product-specific partnerships and collaborations from company announcements or news). Skipped columns: None. Assumptions: Product/Candidate uniquely identifies each entry; Information in research columns should be verifiable from public sources (company websites, press releases, clinical trial databases, industry news); Dates in Latest News should be recent relative to today's date (February 12, 2026); Coherence: All information in a row pertains to the exact Product/Candidate (and its occasional theranostic partner). Validation approach: Use web research to cross-reference information from company websites, official press releases, clinical trial registries, and reputable industry news sources for each research column. Ensure all dates are current and information is consistent and product-specific across sources. Use the-clone-claude as the default model with claude-opus-4.6 with 3 web searches as the QC layer.
config_change_log.clarifying_questions: Should I prioritize verification from official company sources over third-party news for development stage information? Would you like more thorough searching for clinical trial details, which increases processing time but improves accuracy?
config_change_log.ai_summary: Configured comprehensive validation for therapeutic and diagnostic product development tracking. Focuses on verifying product-specific information from company sources, clinical trials, and industry news with quality control enabled.
